title: Dark Navy Blue Silk Hydrangea,5Pcs 20Inch Full Large Artificial Flower Heads with Stems Fake Hydrangeas Flowers for DIY Wedding Centerpiece Home Decor
features: ❀Specification: Total 20 inches, 5 large silk hydrangeas, each flower is 7.8 inches. Each flower has two leaves and a flexible stem (without vase). You can cut or bend stems to fit your vase.

❀ Giant and full flower: unlike ordinary silk hydrangea, our hydrangeas are very large and full, each flower head is independent, you can choose 5 flowers together to form a huge bouquet, or you can choose several individual flowers to form a group for other flower management

SPRING & WEDDING DECORATION Wedding flowers bring color, texture and personality to so many aspects of your big day. You have the option to keep your bouquet or table decoration from your wedding as a reminder for years to come.

❀Occasions:Large artificial hydrangea flowers are naturally realistic, plump and beautiful, it is the ideal choice for your home. Perfect for weddings, parties, banquets, kitchens, dining rooms, tables, rooms, offices, farmhouses, home decor or any other floral decoration. It is also a great gift for someone who is allergic to pollen.

Tips To facilitate transportation, we separate the flower head and stem and put them in the same box. Before assembling the flower stem, please shake the flower head to make the flower plumper and spread it out naturally. Put them in the vase for 1-2 days, the flowers will stretch into a natural and large shape
description: Product description "Products Feature: 1. Suitable for bridal bouquets, wedding banquets, home decor, bookstores, coffee shops, fabric stores, and other occasions. 2. Made of silk, wire, and other materials, it is not easy to deform and collapse and can maintain its shape for a long time. 3. Traditional craftsmanship, lifelike, and highly realistic. 4. The traditional method of dyeing is bright and colorful, does not fade easily, does not wither, and can be cleaned with water. 5. The stems are made of iron wire, so they are easy to bend and adjust to meet your needs. Notice: 1. Please note that the vase is not included in the price 2. Please read the description for details, especially for the size of the flowers. Please allow 1-3mm error due to manual measurement 3. The colors may have different as the difference display, please understand. 4. Due to the Light problems, The product's actual color, and picture color there are subtle differences, please understand, wish you a happy shopping! " Safety Warning This artificial plant contains silk materials that may cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Handle with care and keep away from children and pets. The product is waterproof and can be cleaned with water.
